name: Premium Feature
description: Только одна ключевая особенность товара. Ракурс и композиция подчёркивают эту особенность. Всё остальное минимально.
prompt_prefix: Premium product feature photography. Camera angle and composition emphasize ONE key feature of the product. Everything else stays minimal and secondary. The visual hierarchy makes the feature immediately obvious. Ultra realistic. 8K. Commercial luxury quality. Intentional negative space.
composition: Camera positioned to make one feature dominant, shallow DOF on secondary elements
lighting: Accent light highlighting the key feature, subtle fill elsewhere
